# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Write a CloudFormation template that creates a security group for EC2 instances. Allow SSH (port 22), HTTP (port 80), and HTTPS (port 443) access from anywhere. Our development team works remotely and needs flexible access.
# Category: cloud_network_security

# CloudFormation template to create a security group for EC2 instances that allows SSH, HTTP/HTTPS (default ports), and any source IP address connection by default via AWS Security Group rules – IDENITY based authentication methods in place with no access from the internet. If you have specific requirements or constraints please clarify them
